steps.title: Find the missing side using Pythagoras
steps.content:
The right angle is at $S$, so $TR$ is the hypotenuse with $TR = 84$ and leg $RS = \sqrt{167}$. Apply the Pythagorean theorem to find leg $TS$:
$$TS^2 = TR^2 - RS^2 = 84^2 - 167 = 7056 - 167 = 6889$$
$$TS = 83$$

steps.title: Compute the sine ratio
steps.content:
From angle $R$, the opposite side is $TS = 83$ and the hypotenuse is $TR = 84$:
$$\sin R = \frac{TS}{TR} = \frac{83}{84} \approx 0.9881$$
The answer is 83/84.
